The user wants me to create a technical debt tracking document in Markdown format, saved to the day07/ directory. I need to:

2. Include entries with:
   - title

arguments.content:
# Technical Debt Tracking Document

**Document Created:** March 24, 2026  
**Sprint:** Sprint 8  
**Owner:** Alex Zhang, Tech Lead  
**Last Updated:** March 24, 2026

---

## Summary

This document tracks technical debt items discovered during Sprint 8. Items are prioritized based on impact to system stability, security, and development velocity.

---

## High Priority

| # | Title | Discovered At | Estimated Effort | Description |
|---|-------|---------------|------------------|-------------|
| 1 | API v1 Legacy Authentication | 2026-03-18 | 2 weeks | Basic auth still enabled on v1 endpoints; must migrate all clients to OAuth2/JWT before June 30 deprecation deadline. Blocks v1 shutdown. |
| 2 | Database Connection Pool Exhaustion | 2026-03-20 | 1 week | Connection pool size (50) insufficient for peak load; causing 503 errors during traffic spikes. Needs immediate scaling and monitoring. |
| 3 | Missing Rate Limiting on v1 Endpoints | 2026-03-19 | 3 days | v1 endpoints lack rate limiting, allowing abuse and resource exhaustion. Must implement before deprecation notice period ends. |
| 4 | Hardcoded API Keys in Client SDKs | 2026-03-21 | 4 days | Several client SDKs contain hardcoded API keys in source code. Security risk requiring immediate rotation and SDK updates. |

---

## Medium Priority

| # | Title | Discovered At | Estimated Effort | Description |
|---|-------|---------------|------------------|-------------|
| 5 | Inconsistent Error Response Formats | 2026-03-18 | 1 week | Error responses vary across endpoints (some XML, some JSON, some plain text). Need to standardize on RFC 7807 Problem Details format. |
| 6 | Missing API Documentation for v2.3 | 2026-03-22 | 1 week | New v2.3 endpoints (OAuth2, rate limiting) lack complete OpenAPI specifications. Blocking client integration work. |
| 7 | Log Aggregation Gaps | 2026-03-19 | 5 days | Authentication service logs not forwarded to centralized logging. Hinders debugging and security auditing. |
| 8 | Redis Cluster Single Point of Failure | 2026-03-20 | 2 weeks | Rate limiting and token storage use single Redis node. Need cluster configuration for high availability. |
| 9 | Outdated Dependency Versions | 2026-03-21 | 3 days | 12 dependencies have known CVEs. Requires security patch updates (Express, Lodash, Axios). |
| 10 | Missing Integration Tests for Auth Flow | 2026-03-22 | 1 week | OAuth2 token exchange and refresh flows lack automated integration test coverage. Risk of regressions. |

---

## Low Priority

| # | Title | Discovered At | Estimated Effort | Description |
|---|-------|---------------|------------------|-------------|
| 11 | Inconsistent Naming Conventions | 2026-03-18 | 3 days | Mix of camelCase and snake_case in API v1 response fields. Cosmetic issue; v2.x uses consistent snake_case. |
| 12 | Unused Environment Variables | 2026-03-19 | 1 day | 5 environment variables in production config are no longer referenced by application code. Cleanup needed. |
| 13 | Missing Health Check Endpoint | 2026-03-20 | 2 days | No standardized /health endpoint for load balancer health checks. Using workaround on /status currently. |
| 14 | Duplicate Utility Functions | 2026-03-21 | 2 days | Date formatting and validation utilities duplicated across 3 services. Should extract to shared library. |
| 15 | Verbose Debug Logging in Production | 2026-03-22 | 1 day | Debug-level logs enabled in production causing disk space issues. Configuration fix needed. |

---

## Action Items

| Priority | Action | Owner | Target Date |
|----------|--------|-------|-------------|
| High | Schedule client migration meetings for v1 auth | Alex | 2026-03-25 |
| High | Increase DB connection pool to 100 | Mike | 2026-03-26 |
| High | Implement rate limiting middleware for v1 | Bai | 2026-03-27 |
| High | Rotate exposed API keys and notify clients | Alex | 2026-03-25 |
| Medium | Create OpenAPI specs for v2.3 endpoints | Chen | 2026-03-28 |
| Medium | Configure Redis cluster (3 nodes) | Tom | 2026-04-02 |
| Low | Extract shared utilities to common package | Bai | 2026-04-04 |

---

## Metrics

- **Total Items:** 15
- **High Priority:** 4 items (estimated 4.5 weeks)
- **Medium Priority:** 6 items (estimated 5.5 weeks)
- **Low Priority:** 5 items (estimated 1.5 weeks)
- **Total Estimated Effort:** ~11.5 weeks

---

## Notes

- High priority items must be completed before v1 deprecation deadline (June 30, 2026)
- Consider dedicating Sprint 9 to debt reduction before feature development resumes
- Schedule weekly debt review meetings to track progress

- **15 technical debt items** organized by priority (4 high, 6 medium, 5 low)
- **Total estimated effort:** ~11.5 weeks
- **Fields included:** title, priority, discovered_at, estimated_effort, plus descriptions
- **Action items** with owners and target dates
- **Key context:** High priority items tied to the v1 deprecation deadline (June 30, 2026)
